title: dryopteris gordonii
intro: Dryopteris gordonii, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its potential health benefits and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Dryopteris gordonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
